statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

article.description: Kris Yanku scored 17 with seven assists and Ako Kaluna finished with 10 points, 13 rebounds and four steals to help Northern Arizona beat Embry-Riddle 90-57 Friday night.
article.headline: Yanku scores 17, Northern Arizona beats Embry-Riddle 90-57
article.linkText: Yanku scores 17, Northern Arizona beats Embry-Riddle 90-57
article.story: WINDOW ROCK, Ariz. -- Kris Yanku scored 17 with seven assists and Ako Kaluna finished with 10 points, 13 rebounds and four steals to help Northern Arizona beat Embry-Riddle 90-57 Friday night. Yanku made 5 of 6 field goals for the Lumberjacks (1-3). Nick Agostino finished with 18 points and seven rebounds while Anthony Jensen hit three 3-pointers and scored 13 points for Division II Embry-Riddle. Northern Arizona took a 12-point lead into halftime, used a 19-6 to open up a 69-43 cushion with 6:49 to play and led by as many as 35. The Lumberjacks made 20 of 35 (57 percent) second-half field goals, including eight 3-pointers, and shot 54 percent overall. Embry-Riddle shot just 37 percent, including 7 of 27 (25.9) from 3-point range. The game was played at the BeeHoldzil Fighting Scouts Events Center on the Navajo Nation.
